TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Juan_Carlos_Varela, title = Juan_Carlos_Varela, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Carlos_Varela} }

S.FORM: = Juan Carlos Varela = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 12 jiyax 12 ka Juan Carlos Varela ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Panama ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Carlos Varela, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan panama ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Juan Carlos Varela = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 12 jiyax 12 ka Juan Carlos Varela ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Panama ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Carlos Varela, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan panama ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟuan ʦaɾlos *aɾəla, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
